query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tours FROM tours;
SELECT t.id, t.title, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tr.targetLanguage = 'en' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as en_fields,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tr.targetLanguage = 'es' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as es_fields
FROM tours t
LEFT JOIN translations tr ON tr.entityId = t.id AND tr.entityType = 'tour'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY t.id
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tours FROM tours;
SELECT t.id, t.title, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tr.targetLanguage = 'en' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as en_fields,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tr.targetLanguage = 'es' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as es_fields
FROM tours t
LEFT JOIN translations tr ON tr.entityId = t.id AND tr.entityType = 'tour'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY t.id
LIMIT 30;
